extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the “Against” rows, with criminal proceedings of 0 (company, subsidiaries, directors and promoters), statutory/regulatory actions of 1 against the Company only, and tax proceedings of 7 against the Company only; all “By” rows were excluded. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiaries is ₹26.48 million against the Company plus ₹174.60 million against Subsidiaries, totaling ₹201.08 million, converted at ₹10 million per crore to ₹20.108 crore; promoter/director matters and “By” matters were excluded. The contingent-liabilities table is dated September 30, 2023, but provides line items without a stated Total row, so no contingent-liabilities total is extracted under the stated-total rule. The only customer concentration disclosure is for the Critical Power Business segment, not company-wide, so top-five and top-ten company-wide percentages are null; the disclosed segment percentages use revenue from operations and the latest full fiscal year is Financial Year 2023. The source monetary unit is ₹ million; conversion to crore is by dividing million figures by 10.
